# @json-express/docs-light — AI Context

Zero-dependency API documentation (part of `@json-express/boot`). Mounts a readable HTML doc page and a JSON manifest of every route.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/docs-light
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.docs.path` | `/docs` | Mount path (JSON manifest at `<path>/json`) |
| `jex.docs.baseUrl` | request-derived | Hardcoded base URL override for reverse-proxy setups |

## What it unlocks
- `GET /docs` — human-readable route listing; `GET /docs/json` — machine-readable manifest (agents: fetch this to learn the running API surface).
- Swap to `@json-express/docs-swagger` for OpenAPI/Swagger UI without any other change.
